parameters.query:
SELECT
  s.group_key, s.group_label, s.entity_type, s.sub_key, s.sub_field,
  COALESCE(fcc.display_name_override, s.display_name) AS display_name,
  s.total_count, s.browse_count, s.group_sort, s.sub_sort, s.parent_key
FROM (

  -- ── Weapons ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  SELECT
    'weapons'::text AS group_key, 'Weapons'::text AS group_label,
    'weapon'::text  AS entity_type,
    payload->>'category' AS sub_key, 'category'::text AS sub_field,
    CASE payload->>'category'
      WHEN 'fps'         THEN 'FPS Weapons'
      WHEN 'ship'        THEN 'Ship Weapons'
      WHEN 'attachments' THEN 'Attachments'
      ELSE initcap(payload->>'category')
    END AS display_name,
    COUNT(*)::int AS total_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_base_variant IS NULL OR is_base_variant = true)::int AS browse_count,
    1 AS group_sort,
    CASE payload->>'category'
      WHEN 'fps' THEN 1 WHEN 'ship' THEN 2 WHEN 'attachments' THEN 3 ELSE 9
    END AS sub_sort,
    NULL::text AS parent_key
  FROM entity_display WHERE entity_type = 'weapon' AND NOT hidden
  GROUP BY payload->>'category'

  UNION ALL

  -- ── Armor ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  SELECT
    'armor', 'Armor', 'armor', payload->>'slot', 'slot',
    CASE payload->>'slot'
      WHEN 'Helmet' THEN 'Helmets' WHEN 'Torso'     THEN 'Body Armor'
      WHEN 'Legs'   THEN 'Legs'    WHEN 'Arms'       THEN 'Arms'
      WHEN 'Undersuit' THEN 'Undersuits' WHEN 'Backpack' THEN 'Backpacks'
      ELSE initcap(payload->>'slot')
    END,
    COUNT(*)::int,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_base_variant IS NULL OR is_base_variant = true)::int,
    2,
    CASE payload->>'slot'
      WHEN 'Helmet' THEN 1 WHEN 'Torso' THEN 2 WHEN 'Legs' THEN 3
      WHEN 'Arms'   THEN 4 WHEN 'Undersuit' THEN 5 WHEN 'Backpack' THEN 6
      ELSE 9
    END,
    NULL::text
  FROM entity_display WHERE entity_type = 'armor' AND NOT hidden
  GROUP BY payload->>'slot'

  UNION ALL

  -- ── Vehicles: Ships ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  SELECT 'vehicles','Vehicles','vehicle',NULL,NULL,'Ships',
    COUNT(*)::int,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_base_variant IS NULL OR is_base_variant = true)::int,
    3, 1, NULL::text
  FROM entity_display WHERE entity_type = 'vehicle' AND NOT hidden

  UNION ALL

  -- ── Vehicles: Ground Vehicles ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  SELECT 'vehicles','Vehicles','ground_vehicle',NULL,NULL,'Ground Vehicles',
    COUNT(*)::int,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_base_variant IS NULL OR is_base_variant = true)::int,
    3, 2, NULL::text
  FROM entity_display WHERE entity_type = 'ground_vehicle' AND NOT hidden

  UNION ALL

  -- ── Vehicles: Ship Components summary ─────────────────────────────────────
  SELECT 'vehicles','Vehicles','component','components',NULL,'Ship Components',
    COUNT(*)::int,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE hi.slug IS NULL)::int,
    3, 3, NULL::text
  FROM entity_display ed
  LEFT JOIN datap4k_hidden_items hi
    ON hi.slug = ed.slug AND hi.entity_type = 'component'
  WHERE ed.entity_type = 'component'

  UNION ALL

  -- ── Component sub-sub-types (children of 'components') ────────────────────
  -- folder_category_config filtering handled by outer wrapper JOIN
  SELECT
    'vehicles','Vehicles','component',
    comp_type, 'type',
    CASE comp_type
      WHEN 'PowerPlant'                   THEN 'Power Plants'
      WHEN 'Cooler'                        THEN 'Coolers'
      WHEN 'Shield'                        THEN 'Shields'
      WHEN 'QuantumDrive'                  THEN 'Quantum Drives'
      WHEN 'MiningModifier'                THEN 'Mining Modifiers'
      WHEN 'Module'                        THEN 'Modules'
      WHEN 'SalvageModifier'               THEN 'Salvage Equipment'
      WHEN 'ExternalFuelTank'              THEN 'External Fuel Tanks'
      WHEN 'TractorBeam'                   THEN 'Tractor Beams'
      WHEN 'EMP'                           THEN 'EMP'
      WHEN 'Cargo'                         THEN 'Cargo'
      WHEN 'LifeSupportGenerator'          THEN 'Life Support'
      WHEN 'QuantumFuelTank'               THEN 'Quantum Fuel Tanks'
      WHEN 'DockingCollar'                 THEN 'Docking Collars'
      WHEN 'QuantumInterdictionGenerator'  THEN 'QI Generators'
      WHEN 'JumpDrive'                     THEN 'Jump Drives'
      ELSE comp_type
    END,
    COUNT(*)::int,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE hidden = false)::int,
    3,
    CASE comp_type
      WHEN 'PowerPlant' THEN 31 WHEN 'Cooler' THEN 32 WHEN 'Shield' THEN 33
      WHEN 'QuantumDrive' THEN 34 WHEN 'MiningModifier' THEN 35 WHEN 'Module' THEN 36
      WHEN 'SalvageModifier' THEN 37 WHEN 'ExternalFuelTank' THEN 38
      WHEN 'TractorBeam' THEN 39 WHEN 'EMP' THEN 40 WHEN 'Cargo' THEN 41
      WHEN 'LifeSupportGenerator' THEN 42 WHEN 'QuantumFuelTank' THEN 43
      WHEN 'DockingCollar' THEN 44 WHEN 'QuantumInterdictionGenerator' THEN 45
      WHEN 'JumpDrive' THEN 46 ELSE 99
    END,
    'components'::text
  FROM (
    SELECT
      ed.payload->>'type'   AS comp_type,
      (hi.slug IS NOT NULL) AS hidden
    FROM entity_display ed
    LEFT JOIN datap4k_hidden_items hi
      ON hi.slug = ed.slug AND hi.entity_type = 'component'
    WHERE ed.entity_type = 'component'
      AND ed.payload->>'type' IN (
        'PowerPlant','Cooler','Shield','QuantumDrive','MiningModifier',
        'Module','SalvageModifier','ExternalFuelTank','TractorBeam',
        'EMP','Cargo','LifeSupportGenerator','QuantumFuelTank',
        'DockingCollar','QuantumInterdictionGenerator','JumpDrive'
      )
  ) comp_base
  GROUP BY comp_type
  HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE hidden = false) >= 3

  UNION ALL

  -- ── Mining ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  SELECT
    'mining','Mining','mining', payload->>'section','section',
    CASE payload->>'section'
      WHEN 'elements' THEN 'Elements' WHEN 'compositions' THEN 'Compositions'
      WHEN 'planet-mineables' THEN 'Planet Mineables'
      ELSE initcap(replace(payload->>'section','-',' '))
    END,
    COUNT(*)::int, COUNT(*)::int,
    4,
    CASE payload->>'section'
      WHEN 'elements' THEN 1 WHEN 'compositions' THEN 2
      WHEN 'planet-mineables' THEN 3 ELSE 9
    END,
    NULL::text
  FROM entity_display WHERE entity_type = 'mining' AND NOT hidden
  GROUP BY payload->>'section'

  UNION ALL

  -- ── Items ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  SELECT
    'items','Items','items', payload->>'category','category',
    CASE payload->>'category'
      WHEN 'misc' THEN 'Miscellaneous' WHEN 'food-drink' THEN 'Food & Drink'
      WHEN 'melee' THEN 'Melee Weapons' WHEN 'medical-stim' THEN 'Medical & Stims'
      WHEN 'tool-gadget' THEN 'Tools & Gadgets' WHEN 'hacking-tool' THEN 'Hacking Tools'
      WHEN 'throwable' THEN 'Throwables' ELSE initcap(payload->>'category')
    END,
    COUNT(*)::int, COUNT(*)::int,
    5,
    CASE payload->>'category'
      WHEN 'misc' THEN 1 WHEN 'food-drink' THEN 2 WHEN 'melee' THEN 3
      WHEN 'medical-stim' THEN 4 WHEN 'tool-gadget' THEN 5
      WHEN 'hacking-tool' THEN 6 WHEN 'throwable' THEN 7 ELSE 9
    END,
    NULL::text
  FROM entity_display WHERE entity_type = 'items' AND NOT hidden
  GROUP BY payload->>'category'

  UNION ALL

  -- ── Mining Gear ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  SELECT 'mining_gear','Mining Gear','mining_gear',NULL,NULL,'All Mining Gear',
    COUNT(*)::int, COUNT(*)::int, 6, 1, NULL::text
  FROM entity_display WHERE entity_type = 'mining_gear' AND NOT hidden

  UNION ALL

  -- ── Universe ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  SELECT 'universe','Universe','system',NULL,NULL,'Star Systems',
    COUNT(*)::int,COUNT(*)::int,7,1,NULL::text
  FROM entity_display WHERE entity_type='system'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'universe','Universe','planet',NULL,NULL,'Planets',
    COUNT(*)::int,COUNT(*)::int,7,2,NULL::text
  FROM entity_display WHERE entity_type='planet'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'universe','Universe','moon',NULL,NULL,'Moons',
    COUNT(*)::int,COUNT(*)::int,7,3,NULL::text
  FROM entity_display WHERE entity_type='moon'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'universe','Universe','location',NULL,NULL,'Locations',
    COUNT(*)::int,COUNT(*)::int,7,4,NULL::text
  FROM entity_display WHERE entity_type='location'

  UNION ALL

  -- ── Economy ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  SELECT 'economy','Economy','terminal',NULL,NULL,'Trade Terminals',
    COUNT(*)::int,COUNT(*)::int,8,1,NULL::text
  FROM entity_display WHERE entity_type='terminal'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'economy','Economy','commodity',NULL,NULL,'Commodities',
    COUNT(*)::int,COUNT(*)::int,8,2,NULL::text
  FROM entity_display WHERE entity_type='commodity'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'economy','Economy','company',NULL,NULL,'Companies',
    COUNT(*)::int,COUNT(*)::int,8,3,NULL::text
  FROM entity_display WHERE entity_type='company'

) s
-- ── Universal config filter + display_name_override ─────────────────────────
-- NULL sub_key rows (flat entries) never match the JOIN — always shown
-- Any non-null sub_key can be hidden by inserting a row with hidden=true
LEFT JOIN folder_category_config fcc
  ON  fcc.group_key   = s.group_key
  AND fcc.entity_type = s.entity_type
  AND fcc.sub_key     = s.sub_key
WHERE fcc.hidden IS NOT TRUE
-- group_sort keeps groups in order
-- COALESCE(parent_key,'') groups children after their parent row
-- COALESCE(sort_order, sub_sort) puts lower sort_order values first within context
ORDER BY s.group_sort, COALESCE(s.parent_key, ''), COALESCE(fcc.sort_order, s.sub_sort)
